summary: First-iteration testing of Πεινώκιο POS. Backend: 8/8 pytest tests pass (next-number, order create+persist, auto-increment, date filters, analytics defaults & filters, multi-source, customization payload). Frontend PDA & Analytics flows work end-to-end: menu grid, category tabs, direct add, sandwich customization modal (bread/extras/sauces/double-meat with +1,50€), qty +/-, source toggle, submit+print+reset+increment, analytics stat cards, hourly/source charts, popular items table, date-range and preset buttons all function correctly.

ui_bugs.issue: Bottom-right 'Made with Emergent' watermark overlays part of the 'Εκτύπωση & Αποθήκευση' submit button. Real user clicks near the label work, but Playwright page.click() on the button center hits the badge overlay and no-ops. Consider adding padding-bottom (~40-56px) on the order panel footer or the app container so the submit button clears the watermark.

issues: React DevTools warning: DialogContent missing Description/aria-describedby. Non-blocking accessibility warning; add DialogDescription for a11y.

action_items: (Optional/LOW) Add bottom padding on OrderPanel footer so submit button doesn't visually overlap the Emergent watermark badge.
(Optional) Add DialogDescription to CustomizationModal to remove aria-describedby warning.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py uses string-comparison range on ISO created_at (stored as string). Works because format is fixed; consider storing as native datetime for correctness with mixed timezone offsets.
next_order_number query filters by created_at strings 'YYYY-MM-DDT00:00:00+00:00' — relies on all writes using UTC ISO. Currently consistent (server writes UTC). OK.

PDA.jsx: window.print() called via setTimeout without waiting for Receipt to be committed to DOM in the same tick. Works in practice but could race on slow devices; consider React effect or useLayoutEffect on printOrder.
No error boundary and no toast on 'no items' guard — the submit early-returns silently. Fine but a tiny UX hint could be added.
menu.js id 'al-ougarezа' contains a Cyrillic 'а' character (mixed script). Cosmetic, not functional.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all core flows work; watermark overlap is UI-cosmetic)

seed_data_creation: Created ~5 test orders today via backend_test.py with names prefixed TEST_ (TEST_Πίτα, TEST_Σάντουιτς Χοιρινό). Plus 1 frontend order (Πίτα) during PDA flow test.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 8 backend tests in /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py pass. Frontend PDA & Analytics work. Only quirk: page.click() on order-submit-btn in Playwright hits the Emergent watermark overlay; use JS click (page.evaluate("document.querySelector('[data-testid=order-submit-btn]').click()")) or click higher on the button. Analytics preset keys are 'today', 'week', 'month' (not 7d/30d).
rca of the issue: N/A — no functional bug found. The submit-button 'no-op' seen initially was a Playwright-only artifact: bottom-right Emergent watermark badge sits over the submit button's center; force=True bypasses actionability but click still targets topmost element at coordinates (the badge). Confirmed by using JS click which fires the handler and yields POST /api/orders → 200 and correct UI reset.
